languages.text: "Еще какие! Мы заперты в ловушке ксеносов и бесконечно ходим по кругу, повинуясь их извращенной воле!"

traits.locale_text: "Еще какие! Мы заперты в ловушке ксеносов и бесконечно ходим по кругу, повинуясь их извращённой воле!"

languages.text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"
languages.original_text: "Еще какие! Мы заперты в ловушке ксеносов и бесконечно ходим по кругу, повинуясь их извращенной воле!"

traits.locale_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"
"You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"
"You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

languages.text: “你根本不明白！我们落入了异形的陷阱，一直在原地打转，无力反抗他们邪恶的意志！”
languages.original_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

traits.locale_text: “你根本不明白！我们落入了异形的陷阱，一直在原地打转，无力反抗他们邪恶的意志！”

languages.text: « Vous ne croyez pas si bien dire ! Nous sommes prisonniers d'un piège créé par les xénos, condamnés à tourner en rond telles les victimes impuissantes de leurs caprices dévoyés ! »
languages.original_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne croyez pas si bien dire ! Nous sommes prisonniers d'un piège créé par les xénos, condamnés à tourner en rond telles les victimes impuissantes de leurs caprices dévoyés ! »

languages.text: "Hiçbir fikrin yok! Bir zeno tuzağına düştük, sonsuz bir döngüde dönüp duruyoruz. Onların kâfirce iradelerine direnmek, abesle iştigal etmektir!"
languages.original_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

traits.locale_text: "Hiçbir fikrin yok! Bir zeno tuzağına düştük, sonsuz bir döngüde dönüp duruyoruz. Onların kâfirce iradelerine direnmek, abesle iştigal etmektir!"

languages.text: «¡No tiene ni idea! ¡Estamos atrapados en una trampa xenos, repitiendo una y otra vez el mismo ciclo, incapaces de resistirnos a su retorcida voluntad!».
languages.original_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

traits.locale_text: «¡No tiene ni idea! ¡Estamos atrapados en una trampa xenos, repitiendo una y otra vez el mismo ciclo, incapaces de resistirnos a su retorcida voluntad!».

languages.text: "Ihr habt ja keine Ahnung! Wir sind in einer Xenos-Falle gefangen und drehen uns endlos im Kreis und sind ihrem teuflischen Willen hilflos ausgeliefert."
languages.original_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt ja keine Ahnung! Wir sind in einer Xenos-Falle gefangen und drehen uns endlos im Kreis und sind ihrem teuflischen Willen hilflos ausgeliefert."

languages.text: 「まったく理解できない！我々は異種族の罠に嵌り、彼らの歪んだ意志に抵抗するも不可能な、果てしない円舞に囚われている！」
languages.original_text: "You have no idea! We are caught in a xenos trap, endlessly going around in circles, hopeless to resist their twisted will!"

traits.locale_text: 「まったく理解できない！我々は異種族の罠に嵌り、彼らの歪んだ意志に抵抗するも不可能な、果てしない円舞に囚われている！」
